Scroll
A Love Letter

Our Love Story

A tale in three chapters

I

A first glance

Chapter One

First Meeting

Every great love story has a moment where two paths cross for the very first time, and ours was no different. A chance encounter that neither of us could have predicted became the start of everything.

II

She said yes

The Proposal

He Asked, She Said Yes

On a day filled with love, nerves, and joy, Babatunde got down on one knee and asked Yetunde to spend forever with him. She said yes, and the rest, as they say, is history.

III

09 · 10 · 2026

Final Chapter

Forever Begins

Now we invite our closest family and friends to celebrate with us as we begin this new chapter together. Thank you for being part of our story.

❦ ❦ ❦ ❦

"Two families. One love. A future written together."

Yetunde & Babatunde

Save the Date

The Celebration

Friday, 9th October 2026 · Gravesend, Kent

Join us for our wedding celebration in Gravesend, Kent, surrounded by the people we love most.

Our Wedding Celebration

The Venue

Elite Venue

Dunkirk Cl, Gravesend DA12 5ND, United Kingdom View on Google Maps

Join us at Elite Venue for vows, a feast, live music, and dancing the day and night away with family and friends.

What to Wear

Dress Code

Formal Elegance

"We kindly ask guests to dress in our wedding colours: gold & lilac."

Think elegant gowns, crisp suits, and aso-oke in the palette. Traditional attire is warmly encouraged.

Royal Gold

#c69a2a

Primary: suits, gowns, aso-oke

Lilac

#bb93d1

Bride's family: gele, ipele, gowns

I

Gentlemen

Classic black tie or a tailored suit with a gold pocket square. Elegant and understated.

II

Ladies

Floor-length or cocktail, styled in gold or lilac. Wear what makes you feel incredible.

❦ ❦ ❦ ❦
Traditional Attire

For the Families

Two families, dressed in love

In keeping with Yoruba tradition, each family will wear agreed colours, a visible symbol of two families uniting as one.

Groom's Family

Babatunde's Side

  • ♀

    Female

    Gold gele and ipele.

  • ♂

    Male

    Gold fila.

Colour · Gold

Bride's Family

Yetunde's Side

  • ♀

    Female

    Lilac and gold gele and ipele.

  • ♂

    Male

    Lilac fila.

Colours · Lilac & Gold

Please Note

A Few Kind Reminders

With our warmest gratitude

I

Adults Only

We kindly ask that this be an adults-only celebration. We hope you understand and are able to make arrangements for little ones to be cared for on the day.

II

By Invitation Only

This celebration is strictly by invitation only. Kindly ensure that your RSVP reflects only those named on your invitation.

III

Social Media

Please refrain from posting any photos or videos to social media until the couple shares the news first. We want to savour every moment together.

Captured in Love

Every photo tells a chapter. Here are a few of our favourite moments, with many more waiting for you in our full gallery.
